name: polaris-browser-use
description: Control a headless browser to navigate, click, type, and capture screenshots via MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Navigate, click, type, and screenshot web pages.
interface.longDescription:
Allows the AI agent to control a headless Chromium browser using Playwright. Supports navigation, DOM interaction, form filling, and screenshot capture. Built in Python with browser-use.

Requires: pip install -r requirements.txt (first time only).
defaultPrompt: Navigate to https://example.com and take a screenshot.
Click the login button on the current page.
Fill in the search box with 'AI agents'.
